diagnosis_packet.problem_statement: An aborted provider request continues through a wrapper with a detached signal and is retried as though it were a transient dependency error. Preserve normal retry behavior, but propagate the caller's AbortSignal through the adapter and stop retrying immediately when the dependency reports AbortError.

conclusion.claim: The observed failure is primarily caused by dependency drift.
conclusion.reason: Heuristic fallback only; a local investigator should challenge this ranking.

contract_invariants: Propagate the caller's exact cancellation signal through every wrapper; cancellation is terminal for retries and must use existing platform error identity without invented dependencies.

hypothesis_results.claim: The observed failure is primarily caused by dependency drift.
hypothesis_results.falsification: Hold every other dimension constant and show that changing dependency does not change the outcome.

hypothesis_results.claim: The observed failure is primarily caused by unknown drift.
hypothesis_results.falsification: Hold every other dimension constant and show that changing unknown does not change the outcome.

next_experiments.action: Hold every other dimension constant and show that changing unknown does not change the outcome.

diagnosis_packet.problem_statement: An account report is correct when each order has one fill and one fee, but overstates both quantity and fees when either side has multiple child rows. Repair the query so independent one-to-many relationships are aggregated without a Cartesian multiplication.

conclusion.claim: The observed failure is primarily caused by data drift.
conclusion.reason: Heuristic fallback only; a local investigator should challenge this ranking.

contract_invariants: Aggregate each independent child relation to its parent key before joining sibling one-to-many data.
